[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 101010110 5
1 100111110 6
2 101111011 7
3 011011110 6
4 000000000 a
5 000000000 a
6 000000000 a
7 000000000 a
